name: SommSnap
description: Photograph any wine list, bottle, or shelf and get personalized recommendations from Henri, your AI sommelier.
features: Scan restaurant wine lists for instant recommendations
Analyze individual bottles with detailed tasting notes
Scan store shelves to find the best value
subscription: Free tier + 4 paid tiers up to Master Cellar ($299.99/year).

name: Inspiration & Gratitude
tagline: A gentler way to begin each day.
description: Daily inspiration paired with guided gratitude reflections. Build a warm, sustainable practice that fits into real life.
features: Private by design — your reflections stay yours

name: Science of Being Great
tagline: A guided practice rooted in Wallace D. Wattles' classic.
description: A modern, guided companion to The Science of Being Great — with readings, reflections, and daily practices designed to build character, confidence, and clarity.
features: Full text of the original work, chapter by chapter
